manga.title: Excuse Me, This Is My Room
manga.description:
Kim Jinsoo ends up moving in with his personal bully… will he be able to find love between his bully and his crush?

[Original Webtoon](https://www.toomics.com/webtoon/episode/toon/5200)

**Official Translation:**
